import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from stable_baselines3.common.torch_layers import BaseFeaturesExtractor


class MinigridExtractor(BaseFeaturesExtractor):
    """Dict-compatible CNN extractor for MiniGrid with optional frame stacking."""

    def __init__(self, observation_space, features_dim=512):
        super().__init__(observation_space, features_dim)
        img_space = observation_space.spaces["image"]
        dir_space = observation_space.spaces["direction"]

        channels = img_space.shape[0]  # e.g. 12 when stacking 4 frames
        if channels % 3 != 0:
            raise ValueError(f"Image channels ({channels}) must be divisible by 3")
        self.n_frames = channels // 3
        embed_dim = 16 + 8 + 8  # 32 per cell per frame

        self.embed_obj = nn.Embedding(256, 16)
        self.embed_col = nn.Embedding(256, 8)
        self.embed_state = nn.Embedding(256, 8)

        self.cnn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(self.n_frames * embed_dim, 64, kernel_size=3, stride=1, padding=1),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Conv2d(64, 128, kernel_size=3, stride=1, padding=1),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Conv2d(128, 128, kernel_size=3, stride=1, padding=1),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Flatten(),
        )

        with torch.no_grad():
            sample = torch.zeros(1, self.n_frames * embed_dim, 7, 7)
            n_flatten = self.cnn(sample).shape[1]

        dir_dim = dir_space.shape[0]  # 4
        self.linear = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(n_flatten + dir_dim, features_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
        )

    def forward(self, observations):
        x = observations["image"].long()  # (B, C, 7, 7)
        B, C, H, W = x.shape
        x = x.view(B, self.n_frames, 3, H, W)
        obj = self.embed_obj(x[:, :, 0, :, :])     # (B, n_frames, H, W, 16)
        col = self.embed_col(x[:, :, 1, :, :])     # (B, n_frames, H, W, 8)
        state = self.embed_state(x[:, :, 2, :, :]) # (B, n_frames, H, W, 8)
        x = torch.cat([obj, col, state], dim=-1)   # (B, n_frames, H, W, 32)
        x = x.permute(0, 1, 4, 2, 3).reshape(B, self.n_frames * 32, H, W)
        cnn_out = self.cnn(x)
        dir_vec = observations["direction"].float()
        x = torch.cat([cnn_out, dir_vec], dim=-1)
        return self.linear(x)
